title: Foundry Observability Operating Profile
description: Human-authored operating profile for a Foundry agent deployment. Declares alert coverage, trace-content policy, sampling rates, evaluator parity, retention, and telemetry/evaluation budget. Normalised by observability_evidence.py into foundry-observability-evidence/v1. Note: JSON Schema type:number/integer cannot reject Python booleans at the schema layer; stdlib validation in observability_evidence.py always enforces boolean rejection for numeric fields.

action_group.description: Azure Monitor action group that receives all agent alert notifications.

resource_id.description: Full Azure resource ID of the action group.

owner.description: Team or alias responsible for the action group.

alerts.description: Named alert rules. The four required categories are failure, latency, token_cost, and quality_safety. Additional categories are permitted for forward compatibility.

failure.description: Alert rule name for 5xx / error-rate failures.

latency.description: Alert rule name for P95 latency breaches.

token_cost.description: Alert rule name for token-cost anomalies.

quality_safety.description: Alert rule name for evaluation quality / safety drift.

evaluator_definition.description: Shared evaluator definition pinned across SDLC environments. evaluator_parity is True in evidence iff environments is exactly [dev, ci, production].

environments.description: Environments where this evaluator definition is deployed. Must be exactly [dev, ci, production] for evaluator_parity=True.

trace_policy.description: Trace content and access-control policy for the agent deployment.

content_recording.description: Strict boolean. True = full content recorded; False = metadata only.

redaction_policy.description: Repo-relative path to the PII/sensitive-data redaction policy document.

readers_group.description: Group identity (AAD group name or alias) with read access to traces.

traces.description: Fraction of traces to capture; real number in [0, 1]. Booleans are rejected by stdlib validation.

continuous_evaluation.description: Fraction of sessions submitted to continuous evaluation; real number in [0, 1]. Booleans are rejected by stdlib validation.

retention_days.description: Log/trace retention in days; strict integer >= 30. Booleans and floats are rejected by stdlib validation.

monthly_budget_usd.description: Monthly telemetry and evaluation budget in USD; finite real number > 0. Booleans are rejected by stdlib validation.
